scripts.test:parser: rm -rf /tmp/studyplanner-parser-test-build && tsc scripts/check-syllabus-parser.ts src/services/syllabusLocalParser.ts src/models.ts --outDir /tmp/studyplanner-parser-test-build --module commonjs --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/studyplanner-parser-test-build/scripts/check-syllabus-parser.js
scripts.qa:release: npm run typecheck && npm run test:quick-homework && npm run test:parser && npm run test:parser-endpoint && npm run test:planner && npm run check:scenarios && npm run check:iap && npm run check:release-docs && npm run export:web
scripts.test:planner: rm -rf /tmp/studyplanner-trust-test-build && tsc scripts/check-planner-trust.ts src/logic/planner.ts src/models.ts --outDir /tmp/studyplanner-trust-test-build --module commonjs --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/studyplanner-trust-test-build/scripts/check-planner-trust.js
scripts.test:quick-homework: rm -rf /tmp/studyplanner-quick-homework-test-build && tsc scripts/check-quick-homework-parser.ts src/services/quickHomeworkParser.ts src/models.ts --outDir /tmp/studyplanner-quick-homework-test-build --module commonjs --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/studyplanner-quick-homework-test-build/scripts/check-quick-homework-parser.js
scripts.test:parser-endpoint: rm -rf /tmp/studyplanner-endpoint-normalizer-test-build && tsc scripts/check-syllabus-endpoint-normalizer.ts src/services/syllabusParseNormalizer.ts src/logic/planner.ts src/models.ts --outDir /tmp/studyplanner-endpoint-normalizer-test-build --module commonjs --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/studyplanner-endpoint-normalizer-test-build/scripts/check-syllabus-endpoint-normalizer.js
